title: Etch Component Registry
description: Schema for .etch-components/registry.json — the master catalog of generated Etch components and page compositions.

projectName.description: Human-readable project name, set on first use

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the registry was initialized

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last registry modification

components.description: All generated components in this project

name.description: Kebab-case component name matching the folder name

description.description: Natural language description of the component

type.description: Component type for Etch convention selection

tags.description: Descriptive tags for search and filtering

files.description: Relative paths to the component output files

js.description: Relative path to script.js, or null if no JS was generated

hasJs.description: Whether JavaScript was generated for this component

variants.description: Named variants of this component (e.g. light, dark, compact)

acssTokensUsed.description: ACSS custom property names referenced in the generated CSS and HTML

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this component was generated

pages.description: Page compositions created with the /page command

sections.description: Ordered list of component names that make up this page

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this page was composed
